◎简　　介  

　　A breathtaking series of aerial programmes offering an entirely different view of the world. From 10,000ft down to just a few feet above ground, discover new perspectives through thrilling journeys: from mountains and great cities to fantastic castles and the great natural wonders of the globe. Series 8 travels everywhere from Spain to South Africa, from the north of Iceland to North Carolina in the USA.Episode 1: England – Hutton in the Forest to St Bees HeadEpisode 2: England – Seven Sisters to Canterbury CathedralEpisode 3: Wales – Monmouth to Dee EstuaryEpisode 4: USA, Wyoming – Lost Cabin to Devil’s TowerEpisode 5: Ireland – Mullaghmore to Aran IslandsEpisode 6: France – South CoastEpisode 7: Germany – Around BerlinEpisode 8: USA, VermontEpisode 9: USA, North CarolinaEpisode 10: USA New HampshireEpisode 11: Iceland – North of the CountryEpisode 12: Spain – South East CoastEpisode 13: South Africa – South West Along CoastEpisode 14: USA, Arkansas
